title: shattering earthy uruguayan phyllo empanadas
description: a flavorful and crispy empanada featuring earthy mushrooms and cheese, perfect for a lazy sunday
instructions: thaw the phyllo dough according to the package instructions
preheat the oven to 375 degrees fahrenheit
in a pan, sauté the onion and porcini mushrooms until they are soft and fragrant
stack the phyllo sheets and cut them into squares, about 4 inches per side
place a spoonful of the mushroom mixture onto the center of each square, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges
brush the edges with water and fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal the empanada
brush the tops of the empanadas with oil and place them on a baking sheet
bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy
remove the empanadas from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving
